text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's time for a most thrilling cooking experience!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Woo, woooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...This concerns me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let's get started! On the table, you'll find your
single ingredient—a cup of premade instant
ramen noodles!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh, and just by adding a drop of this special
flavoring I've concocted...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Something wonderful will happen! These already
delicious noodles will become even better!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: There's something really... fishy about this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Lies! This is the precious end product of my
inquisitive foray into the culinary world! I
certainly don't have any intentions to record the
effects you experience upon tasting this novel
deliciousness!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Rest assured! We've already tried this taste
explosion for ourselves, so it's perfectly safe to
eat! Go on, have a bite!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There she goes. No talking her down when she
gets like this.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
We don't have much of a choice... The two of
them seem unharmed... so let's give their noodles
a try.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So, what are your thoughts? The added flavoring
really makes the difference, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm shocked. It's actually way better. What's that
flavoring made of?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I guess some things... aren't always certain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
See? This is a show of my vested interest in the
culinary arts. There's nothing better than a
delicious meal.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's not all. This flavoring also enhances the
after-meal tea—urk?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This tea tastes like ramen. I must not have
accounted for the duration of the flavoring's
effect on the tastebuds...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Wait, does that mean—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Tachyon, you've got to let me try some!
Does it taste like soy sauce ramen? Pork bone
broth? Oh, is it miso?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I knew this would be terrible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the rest of the day, all the food they eat
tastes like ramen. Only Fine Motion remains
enthusiastic about the ordeal.
